title: Genie Space PDF export, citations, and accuracy improvements
body:
* **PDF export for Research Agent (Beta) reports**: Export Genie Research Agent reports as PDF files. See [Export Agent mode reports](/aws/en/genie/agent-mode#export).
* **SQL example citations**: Genie's analysis steps now cite the SQL examples used. See [Review a response](/aws/en/genie/talk-to-genie#review-response).
* **Currency formatting improvements**: Numeric columns in table results now use more conservative currency formatting rules to avoid incorrect assumptions.
* **Improved question type handling**: Genie now categorizes common question types (top K, percentage, and distribution) more accurately so the right context is applied, improving results.
